WHAT IS $SOLARIO?

THE LEGEND OF THE PURPLE PLUMBER

Once upon a time in the Mushroom Kingdom, a purple plumber named Solario got tired of fixing pipes for minimum wage. He strapped on his golden overalls, slapped an S on his cap, and said: "We're going to pump.fun."

$SOLARIO is a community memecoin on Solana — zero utility, maximum vibes, and a guy who will stomp every goomba (bear) in his way. The charts only go one direction: UP 🚀

💜 Purple 🟡 Gold 🍄 Goomba Stomper 🎮 Gamer Coin 🚀 Solana 🔥 Pump.fun
